title: Figure 1 in Getting to a decision: using structured decision-making to gain consensus on approaches to invasive species control
author: Poorten, Brett van
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Steps involved in structured decision-making. Steps can be re-evaluated at any point; responses should be re-evaluated once new data is gathered following implementation. Adapted from Liu and Cook (2016).
